repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc or InferShape with 'const struct gert::Shape' has no member named 'GetDims', do not use `GetDims()` to get shape dimensions; instead use `GetDim(index)` to retrieve each dimension individually.

When opbuild fails in InferShape with cannot convert const gert::Shape* to const gert::StorageShape* on GetInputShape, do not use StorageShape* or SetOriginShape; instead use const gert::Shape* with SetDimNum and SetDim in InferShape (gert::InferShapeContext).
